mapper.sql: select company_id, company_code, company_name, is_key_unit, short_name, company_type, building_type, total_land_area, total_building_area, address, province, city, district, check_in_longitude, check_in_latitude, check_in_radius, check_in_address, contact_person, contact_phone, contact_email, contract_start_date, contract_end_date, contract_status, project_name, sign_requirement, credit_code, auto_fire_system, building_floor_count, building_height, maintenance_standard, maintenance_content, project_overview, report_mode, project_leader_name, technical_leader_name, property_manage_unit, maintenance_scheme_name, maintenance_scheme_path, building_count, equipment_count, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from fire_company

c.company_id, c.company_code, c.company_name, c.is_key_unit, c.short_name, c.company_type, c.building_type, c.total_land_area, c.total_building_area, c.address, c.province, c.city, c.district, c.check_in_longitude, c.check_in_latitude, c.check_in_radius, c.check_in_address, c.contact_person, c.contact_phone, c.contact_email, coalesce(lc.start_date, c.contract_start_date) as contract_start_date, coalesce(lc.end_date, c.contract_end_date) as contract_end_date, case when lc.contract_id is not null and lc.end_date is not null and lc.end_date < curdate() then 'expired' when lc.contract_id is not null and lc.end_date is not null and lc.end_date >= curdate() then 'valid' when lc.contract_id is not null then '' when c.contract_end_date is not null and c.contract_end_date < curdate() then 'expired' when c.contract_end_date is not null and c.contract_end_date >= curdate() then 'valid' else ifnull(c.contract_status, '') end as contract_status, lc.contract_id, coalesce(nullif(c.project_name, ''), lc.project_name) as project_name, lc.contract_name, 'Admin' as entry_unit, c.sign_requirement, c.credit_code, c.auto_fire_system, c.building_floor_count, c.building_height, c.maintenance_standard, c.maintenance_content, c.project_overview, c.report_mode, c.project_leader_name, c.technical_leader_name, c.property_manage_unit, c.maintenance_scheme_name, c.maintenance_scheme_path, ifnull(bc.building_count, 0) as building_count, c.equipment_count, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark

from fire_company c left join fire_contract lc on lc.contract_id = ( select fc.contract_id from fire_contract fc where fc.company_id = c.company_id and fc.del_flag = '0' and fc.terminate_flag = '0' order by fc.end_date desc, fc.contract_id desc limit 1 ) left join ( select company_id, count(1) as building_count from fire_building where del_flag = '0' group by company_id ) bc on bc.company_id = c.company_id
mapper.select:
select
c.del_flag in ('0', '2')
and c.company_name like concat('%', #{companyName}, '%')
and ( c.company_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ifnull(c.project_name, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ifnull(lc.project_name, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ifnull(lc.contract_name, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ifnull(c.address, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and c.province like concat('%', #{province}, '%')
and c.city like concat('%', #{city}, '%')
and c.district like concat('%', #{district}, '%')
and c.is_key_unit = #{isKeyUnit}
and #{entryUnit} = 'Admin'
and coalesce(lc.end_date, c.contract_end_date) < curdate()
and exists ( select 1 from fire_contract active_contract where active_contract.company_id = c.company_id and active_contract.del_flag = '0' and active_contract.terminate_flag = '0' and active_contract.start_date is not null and active_contract.end_date is not null and active_contract.start_date <= curdate() and active_contract.end_date >= curdate() )
and date_format(c.create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginCreateTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
and date_format(c.create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') <= date_format(#{params.endCreateTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
order by case when c.del_flag = '2' then 1 else 0 end, c.create_time desc

select
where c.del_flag in ('0', '2') and c.company_id in
#{companyId}
order by case when c.del_flag = '2' then 1 else 0 end, c.create_time desc
where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' order by company_name
select count(*) from fire_company where del_flag = '0' and status = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into fire_company ( company_code, company_name, is_key_unit, short_name, company_type, building_type, total_land_area, total_building_area, address, province, city, district, check_in_longitude, check_in_latitude, check_in_radius, check_in_address, contact_person, contact_phone, contact_email, contract_start_date, contract_end_date, contract_status, project_name, sign_requirement, credit_code, auto_fire_system, building_floor_count, building_height, maintenance_standard, maintenance_content, project_overview, report_mode, project_leader_name, technical_leader_name, property_manage_unit, maintenance_scheme_name, maintenance_scheme_path, building_count, equipment_count, status, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{companyCode}, #{companyName}, #{isKeyUnit}, #{shortName}, #{companyType}, #{buildingType}, #{totalLandArea}, #{totalBuildingArea}, #{address}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{checkInLongitude}, #{checkInLatitude}, #{checkInRadius}, #{checkInAddress}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{contractStartDate}, #{contractEndDate}, #{contractStatus}, #{projectName}, #{signRequirement}, #{creditCode}, #{autoFireSystem}, #{buildingFloorCount}, #{buildingHeight}, #{maintenanceStandard}, #{maintenanceContent}, #{projectOverview}, #{reportMode}, #{projectLeaderName}, #{technicalLeaderName}, #{propertyManageUnit}, #{maintenanceSchemeName}, #{maintenanceSchemePath}, #{buildingCount}, #{equipmentCount}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update fire_company set del_flag = '2' where company_id = #{companyId}

update fire_company set del_flag = '2' where company_id in
#{companyId}
mapper.select: select c.company_id, c.company_code, c.company_name, c.project_name, c.short_name, c.company_type, c.address, c.check_in_longitude, c.check_in_latitude, c.check_in_radius, c.check_in_address, c.contact_person, c.contact_phone, c.status from fire_company c inner join fire_user_company uc on c.company_id = uc.company_id where uc.user_id = #{userId} and c.del_flag = '0' and c.status = '0' order by c.company_name

select uc.id, uc.user_id, uc.company_id, uc.role_type, uc.create_time, u.user_name, u.login_name, u.phonenumber from fire_user_company uc left join sys_user u on uc.user_id = u.user_id where uc.company_id = #{companyId} order by uc.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into fire_user_company (user_id, company_id, role_type, create_by, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{companyId}, #{roleType}, #{createBy}, sysdate())

insert into fire_user_company (user_id, company_id, role_type, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.userId}, #{item.companyId}, #{item.roleType}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from fire_user_company where user_id = #{userId} and company_id = #{companyId}
